title: showcase: Add Pollinations CLI to showcase and fix misinformation with existing app
author: blueplaysgames3921

gist.headline: Command line pollination
gist.blurb: A massive shoutout to blueplaysgames3921 for dropping the Pollinations CLI into our showcase! It brings text, image, audio, and an autonomous coding agent named Pollina straight to your terminal.
gist.summary: Added the community-built Pollinations CLI to the app showcase, featuring terminal-based access to all models and a new autonomous coding agent.
gist.impact: Developers can now generate text, images, audio, and video, or run the autonomous 'Pollina' agent directly from their command line.
gist.visual_concept: A retro terminal/command line interface representing the CLI, with Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot representing the autonomous 'Pollina' agent working together.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny hacker hoodie, sitting next to a chunky retro computer terminal displaying bright lime green (#ecf874) command line code. A small, friendly robot companion with a monitor head stands nearby holding a floppy disk. Soft pastel lavender and cream gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley, emotionally warm and nostalgic.
